workingTreeContext: The focused tests were run after strengthening scope, runtime identity, and optimize proposal assertions; this evidence bundle, review result, regenerated claim artifacts, and matching test changes are intended to be committed together.
summary: Focused deterministic tests prove effective claim-discovery scan scope is serialized for future reproduction, report packets only carry provider/model identity from explicit telemetry, and optimize proposal generation does not directly edit consumer-owned target files.

evidenceScope.targetSurface: deterministic claim-discovery, report-packet, and optimize-proposal contracts
evidenceScope.claimBoundary: This bundle proves the named packet and pure proposal-generation boundaries through focused unit tests. It does not prove semantic quality of arbitrary host runners, model behavior, or app-specific optimization quality.
notClaimed: Every consumer adapter command is honest
Every external runner reports truthful provider/model metadata
A generated proposal has been applied to a consumer-owned prompt, skill, or instruction file

protectedBehaviors: claim discovery packets serialize adapter entries, include/exclude globs, evidence roots, linked markdown depth, adapter path, traversal mode, explicit-source status, and gitignore policy
report packets do not infer provider, model, or runtime fingerprint from command text or command-observation artifacts
report packets carry provider/model/runtime fingerprint when supplied through explicit mode telemetry
optimize proposal generation carries target-file metadata and suggested changes without modifying the target file contents

claimSupport.reason: `TestDiscoverClaimProofPlanUsesAdapterClaimDiscoveryEntries` proves the binary records the effective scan scope needed for a future agent to reproduce or refresh discovery: entries, include/exclude bounds, evidence roots, linked depth, adapter path, traversal mode, explicit-source status, and gitignore policy.
`TestBuildReportPacketOnlyCarriesExplicitRuntimeIdentity` proves provider/model/runtime identity are not inferred from command text or logs and only appear when explicit mode telemetry supplies them.

`TestGenerateOptimizeProposalAddsPassingSimplificationForRuntimeChange` proves optimize proposal generation keeps target-file metadata in the proposal and leaves the consumer-owned target file unchanged.

decision.reason: The focused deterministic tests directly cover the named packet serialization, telemetry provenance, and proposal-only optimization boundaries without requiring model or host-app behavior evidence.
